welcome.title: Welcome to KeepKey
welcome.oobIntro: Let's update your firmware and set up your wallet.
welcome.intro: Let's get your hardware wallet set up.

bootloader.title: Bootloader Update
bootloader.description: Your bootloader needs to be updated for security and compatibility.
bootloader.doNotUnplugBrick: Do NOT unplug your device. Interrupting can brick the device.
bootloader.step2Hold: 2. Hold down the button on the device
bootloader.step3Plugin: 3. While holding, plug in the USB cable
bootloader.step4Release: 4. Release when the bootloader screen appears
bootloader.listeningForBootloader: Listening for device in bootloader mode...
bootloader.verifyBackupHint: On the KeepKey, it will ask you to verify backup. We will do this after updating — hold the button to skip this for now.
bootloader.deviceWillGuide: Your KeepKey will guide you through the update process.

firmware.title: Firmware Update
firmware.oobDescription: Your device has factory firmware. A critical update is required.
firmware.description: A firmware update is available for your device.
firmware.doNotDisconnect: Do not disconnect your device during the update
firmware.mayNeedConfirm: You may need to confirm on the device screen
firmware.fundsRemainSafe: Your funds and settings will remain safe
firmware.rebootingMessage: Your KeepKey is restarting with the new firmware. Please wait...
firmware.firmwareHashNotFound: Firmware hash not found in manifest
firmware.lookAtDeviceAndPress: Look at your KeepKey screen and press the button to confirm.
firmware.verifyBackupNote: If your device is not set up, you can safely ignore any "verify backup" screen.
firmware.uploadingFirmware: Uploading firmware... Do not disconnect your device
firmware.deviceWillRestart: Your device will restart when complete.
firmware.skipWarning: You can continue with older firmware. Some features may not work as expected.

initChoose.title: Set Up Your Wallet
initChoose.description: Choose how you'd like to set up your KeepKey
initChoose.createDescription: Generate a new seed phrase on your device
initChoose.recoverDescription: Enter your recovery seed phrase on the device

initProgress.followPromptsCreate: Follow the prompts on your KeepKey device screen. Write down the seed words carefully — they are your backup.
initProgress.followPromptsRecover: Follow the prompts on your KeepKey device screen. Enter your recovery seed phrase using the device.
initProgress.followPrompts: Follow the prompts on your KeepKey device screen.
initProgress.lookAtDevice: Look at your KeepKey device and follow the on-screen instructions.

initLabel.giveAName: Give your KeepKey a friendly name to identify it easily

complete.recoveredDescription: Your wallet has been successfully restored from your recovery phrase
complete.createdDescription: Your new wallet is now secure and ready to use
